edit_diagnosis: Shaping dominance reward hack; rebalance by reducing r_approach_region weight and increasing r_stable_landing_once terminal bonus.

Reward hack through dense shaping dominance: the agent exploits r_landing_quality and r_stability to hover indefinitely, achieving high total reward with zero landings. An atomic coupled rebalancing is performed, halving the weights of the two dominant shaping components and increasing the one‑time landing bonus to 200, to shift incentive toward terminal success while preserving basic guidance.
